summary: Full-service landscape gardening for residential and commercial clients.
bullets: Garden maintenance: pruning, lawn care, fertilizer application.
Plant installation and landscape installation for new and existing gardens.
Provide ongoing plant care to keep gardens healthy and thriving.

summary: Agricultural field operations and research support.
bullets: Field operations: crop maintenance, plot preparation, and planting.
Supported agricultural research through hands-on fieldwork.

summary: Event coordination for community and plant-related events.
bullets: Event coordination, vendor management, and logistics.
Customer service and on-the-day programme execution.

summary: Youth coaching through a sport-for-development programme.
bullets: Led youth coaching sessions focused on leadership and teamwork.
Mentored young players and supported their personal growth.
